patch.value: Group diagnostics/maintenance under pm ops: stats, health, validate, gc, telemetry, eval as subcommands

Six read/maintenance commands become pm ops <verb> (or pm doctor namespace — final noun per ADR pm-pbyu), each old spelling alias-shimmed. Keeps validate/health output contracts byte-identical for CI consumers. Duplicate check: no existing ops/diagnostics-namespace item.

pm ops stats/health/validate/gc/telemetry/eval subcommands with flag parity; old spellings alias-shimmed with byte-identical output (CI scripts unaffected); contracts/MCP/completions/docs regenerated; existing specs pass via aliases

author: claude-code-agent

Diagnostics and maintenance commands become pm ops <verb> under ADR pm-pbyu: stats, health, validate, gc, telemetry, and eval. Each old spelling is alias-shimmed. Keeps validate/health output contracts byte-identical for CI consumers. Duplicate check: no existing ops/diagnostics-namespace item.
Group diagnostics/maintenance under pm ops: stats, health, validate, gc, telemetry, eval

message: Resolve eval ownership under ops for CLI grammar planning
